notes: Trace login selectors are now fixed to the verified Trace WMS fields: #username, #password, and #loginButton
Trace Login Settings keeps username and password editable while showing selectors as read-only
Trace login reset now disables auto-login without wiping saved username or password
TraceCollector treats a no-download export after two 10-second attempts as an empty hour and continues to the next window
Maintenance now analyzes Warehouse Data Collector and TraceCollector in one process while protecting raw exports, configs, and master datasets
This release includes a separate rebuilt TraceCollector-portable.zip asset for updating the external TraceCollector engine
